name: Slurm Efficiency Report
summary: Summarize completed Slurm job efficiency from accounting data.
description: This skill helps users and support teams review CPU, memory, elapsed time, and requested resource signals for a completed Slurm job using read-only accounting commands.

inputs.name: job_id
inputs.description: Completed Slurm job id, array task id, or job step id to inspect.

outputs.name: efficiency_summary
outputs.description: Optional seff summary for CPU and memory efficiency when available.

outputs.name: accounting_table
outputs.description: Read-only sacct report with state, elapsed time, requested memory, MaxRSS, TotalCPU, CPUs, and nodes.

outputs.name: tuning_notes
outputs.description: Human-readable prompts for adjusting future CPU, memory, and wall-time requests.

examples.title: Collect a Slurm job efficiency report

tests.description: Validate the manifest and example script.
Run the script with a completed Slurm job id and confirm it only reads accounting data.
